title: TGG's Fakemon Oddities
description: A series of fakemon as an addon for Cobblemon, created by TGG.
body:
# PLEASE NOTE
**This pack was not created by me, only polished and published on modrinth with permission. I highly reccomend you go check out [TGG on twitter](https://x.com/TGGtheStickBoy) or on discord under _thatgoofyguy_**
# 
### In order for the addon to function properly, it needs to be in the world's datapack folder and as an active resource pack
This is an addon for the Cobblemon mod that adds regional forms, divergent evolutions, paradox forms, and completely original designs (again, by TGG).

## New Pokemon

<details>
<summary>Serperior</summary>
  
![A purple, yellow, and green scaled Serperior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1d3cfc495c72e75ca0607eb6597b7e4735c2576.png)
- Evolves from Servine at level 36
- Type: _Grass/Dragon_
- Ultra Rare spawn in floral and grassland biomes
- Abilities: _Overgrow, Multiscale (Hidden)_
- HP: _75_
- ATK: _75_
- DEF: _90_
- SP.ATK: _110_
- SP.DEF: _90_
- SPEED: _90_
## 
**Spawn Command:**
- /spawnpokemon serperior banbanian
</details>

<details>
<summary>Cinderace</summary>

![A Cinderace with flowy garments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1355f5735116816a80c3812e9c607f682992a035.png)
- Evolves from Raboot at level 36
- Type: _Fire/Fairy_
- Ultra Rare spawn in jungle biomes
- Abilities: _Blaze, Infiltrator (Hidden)_
- HP: _80_
- ATK: _100_
- DEF: _70_
- SP.ATK: _100_
- SP.DEF: _70_
- SPEED: _110_
##
**Spawn Command:**
- /spawnpokemon cinderace banbanian
</details>

<details>
<summary>Quaquaval</summary>

![A Quaquaval with large wings and a broad build](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f18cb2ccfbc7dcc31c54ef73b3ae973ea8b3d5e.png)
- Evolves from Quaxwell at level 36
- Type: _Water/Ghost_
- Ultra Rare spawn in deep oceans, frozen oceans, or tropical island biomes
- Abilities: _Torrent, Cursed Body (Hidden)_
- HP: _90_
- ATK: _115_
- DEF: _85_
- SP.ATK: _80_
- SP.DEF: _90_
- SPEED: _70_
##
**Spawn Command:**
- /spawnpokemon quaquaval banbanian
</details>

<details>
<summary>Eclipseral</summary>

![Flakes make a ring around an eyed planetoid. It is glowing orange](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/492f63ebef253bd47cf42f90bf087276967d3763.png)
- Evolves from Solrock when given a Moon Stone
- Type: _Rock/Fire_
- Ultra Rare spawn in volcanic, badlands, or desert biomes
- Ability: _Levitate_
- HP: _100_
- ATK: _110_
- DEF: _100_
- SP.ATK: _60_
- SP.DEF: _70_
- SPEED: _80_
##
**Spawn Command:**
- /spawnpokemon eclipseral
</details>

<details>
<summary>Stellora</summary>

![A crescent moon shape orbiting a small planetoid with an eye. It is glowing blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e71c80247f11dfc4725dd31a4254b6ed14a8891.png)
- Evolves from Lunatone when given a Sun Stone
- Type: _Rock/Ice_
- Ultra Rare spawn in tundra, freezing, or cold biomes
- Ability: _Levitate_
- HP: _100_
- ATK: _60_
- DEF: _70_
- SP.ATK: _110_
- SP.DEF: _100_
- SPEED: _80_
##
**Spawn Command:**
- /spawnpokemon stellora
</details>

<details>
<summary>Marvagem</summary>

![A Sableye attatched to a construct made of various ore materials from Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ab202f3e57c67b49b25906656b8d05dbe2f0972.png)
- Evolves from Sableye when given a Diamond Block
- Type: _Dark/Ghost_
- Ultra Rare spawn in caves
- Ability: _Magic Bounce_
- HP: _125_
- ATK: _130_
- DEF: _125_
- SP.ATK: _100_
- SP.DEF: _100_
- SPEED: _80_
##
**Spawn Command:**
- /spawnpokemon marvagem
</details>

<details>
<summary>Sludgeon</summary>

![A purple quadruped, the head, tail, and paws appear to be oozing liquid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/985170624811310b4fbeeb8c0606aadf7da667f4.png)
- Evolves from Eevee when given a Black Sludge
- - Type: _Poison_
- Ultra Rare spawn in swamp biomes
- Abilities: _Poison Touch, Liquid Ooze (Hidden)_
- HP: _130_
- ATK: _65_
- DEF: _60_
- SP.ATK: _110_
- SP.DEF: _95_
- SPEED: _65_
##
**Spawn Command:**

</details>

<details>
<summary>Skulurk</summary>

![A Golurk with one arm replaced with a large arm-like sculk tendril, and various sculk themed aspects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/193540efe9551e0b3d667bd373c708facad3d23f.png)
- Evolves from Golett when given an Echo Shard
- - Type: _Dark/Ground_
- Ultra Rare spawn in deep dark biomes
- Abilities: _Cursed Body, No Guard (Hidden)_
- HP: _110_
- ATK: _175_
- DEF: _110_
- SP.ATK: _100_
- SP.DEF: _110_
- SPEED: _65_
##
**Spawn Command:**
- /spawnpokemon skulurk
</details>

<details>
<summary>Metagroil</summary>

![A grill that has four lava legs, resembles metagross](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3e09bf26d25df9ef0372aa7c7336812736ae97a.png)
- Type: _Fire/Steel_
- Ultra Rare spawn in the Nether
- Abilities: _Flash Fire, Flame Body (Hidden)_
- HP: _75_
- ATK: _125_
- DEF: _125_
- SP.ATK: _110_
- SP.DEF: _125_
- SPEED: _110_
##
**Spawn Command:**

</details>

<details>
<summary>Regiplenti</summary>

![A titan made of flora](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b46c1f2592c794cc46a5191c3e6dd0e3256d8d64.png)
- Type: _Grass_
- Ultra Rare spawn in highlands, plains, and floral biomes

- ATK: _150_
- DEF: _75_
- SP.ATK: _150_

- SPEED: _50_
##
**Spawn Command:**
- /spawnpokemon regiplenti
</details>


<details>
<summary>Tuedia</summary>

![Abstract shapes that somewhat resemble a face with horns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/434e3a0bbbde74a1f8efb17b659ae51477882c98.png)
- Type: _Ghost/Normal_
- Ultra Rare spawn in hill, mountain, and highlands biomes
- Ability: _Beast Boost_

- ATK: _100_

- SP.ATK: _180_
- SP.DEF: _130_
- SPEED: _90_
##
**Spawn Command:**
- /spawnpokemon tuedia
</details>

<details>
<summary>Iron Demon</summary>

![A humanoid robot with two horn-like prongs on its head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08e19fc42217ae73eb0ec00bae53e7d2b0293e43.png)

- SP.ATK: _130_
- SP.DEF: _120_
- SPEED: _60_
##
**Spawn Command:**
- /spawnpokemon irondemon

<details>
<summary>Iron Mind</summary>

![A metallic Mewtwo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31d3291c5dcba8623ac4edda578705ff20d2cf5c.png)

- Ultra Rare spawn in the End
- Ability: _Quark Drive_

- ATK: _90_
- DEF: _100_
- SP.ATK: _170_
- SP.DEF: _100_
- SPEED: _130_
##
**Spawn Command:**
- /spawnpokemon ironmind

<details>
<summary>Green Gorilla</summary>

![A large, green gorilla. It looks angry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07cdd3ad9e52a61c6bdf5e39b1ee5f47a5070d79.png)
- Type: _Grass/Rock_
- Ultra Rare spawn in jungle, taiga, and lush biomes

- ATK: _130_
- DEF: _90_
- SP.ATK: _75_
- SP.DEF: _60_
- SPEED: _120_
##
**Spawn Command:**

<details>
<summary>Fleeting Wish</summary>

![A puppet Jirachi with a single eyed core with long arms bursting from the stomach area](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ca5181dd051500d4f384e632b48d8282c092a42.png)

- Ultra Rare spawn in the End

- SP.ATK: _115_

##
**Spawn Command:**

<details>
<summary>Missingno</summary>

![An amalgamation of all the original Missingno spirtes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6aa5fcf8ee57461b07c4c75a620df62741e98324.png)
- Type: _Flying_
- Common spawn in the Void and in Biomes o Plenty's End Corruption biome
- Ability: _Perish Body_
- HP: _111_
- ATK: _111_
- DEF: _111_
- SP.ATK: _111_
- SP.DEF: _111_
- SPEED: _111_
##
**Spawn Command:**
- /spawnpokemon missingno
